metadata.title: Interpretable public-data validation of pretreatment mucosal modules associated with anti-TNF outcomes in inflammatory bowel disease
metadata.description: Code and derived outputs for a public-database transcriptomic module-analysis study of pretreatment mucosal signatures associated with anti-TNF outcomes in inflammatory bowel disease. The archive includes analysis scripts, reproducibility documentation, selected derived result tables, figure outputs and supplementary tables. Large public raw archives are not included and should be obtained from the cited GEO/Zenodo source datasets.
